text: haelohim asher-diber miqedem pe'amim rabot uvefanim shonim el-avoteynu beyad haneviim diber eleynu beacharit hayamim haele beyad beno
asher-samo leyoresh kol vegam-'asa veyado et-ha'olamot
vehu zohar kevodo vetselem 'atsemuto venose khol bidevar gevurato veacharey taharo otanu benafesho mechatoteynu yashav limin hagedula bameromim
vayigedal meod min-hamaleakhim kaasher hashem asher nechalo yaqar hu measher lahem
ki el-mi min hamaleakhim amar me'olam beni ata ani hayom yelidetikha ve'od ani eheyeh-lo leav vehu yiheyeh-li leven
uvahavio et-habekhor shenit la'olam omer vehishetachavu-lo kal-elohim
hen lamaleakhim hu omer 'ose maleakhayv ruchot mesharatayv esh lohet
velaben omer kiseakha elohim 'olam va'ed shevet mishor shevet malekhutekha
ahaveta tsedeq vatisena resha' 'al-ken meshachakha elohim eloheykha shemen sason mechavereykha
veomer ata adonay lefanim haarets yasadeta uma'ase yadeykha shamayim
hema yovedu veata ta'amod vekhulam kabeged yivelu
kalevush tachalifem veyachalofu veata hu ushenoteykha lo yitamu
veel-mi min-hamaleakhim amar me'olam shev limini 'ad-ashit oyeveykha hadom lerageleykha
halo khulam ruchot hasharet hema sheluchim le'ezera be'ad habaim lareshet et-hayeshu'a
lakhen 'aleynu lishemor meod et-asher shama'enu pen-yaluz veyovad mimenu
ki im-hadavar haneemar 'al-yedey hamaleakhim haya qayam vekhal-pesha' umeri nasa et-'anesho kamishepat
eykh nimalet anachenu im-lo nasim lev liteshu'a gedola kazot haneemara mitechila befi haadon umequyemet-lanu meet shome'eyha
vegam-elohim he'id 'aleyha beotot uvemofetim uvigevurot shonot uvematenot rucha qadesho asher chileq kiretsono
ki lo tachat yad-hamaleakhim shat et-ha'olam haba asher anachenu medaberim bo
ki im-kaasher he'id hame'id lemor mah-enosh ki-tizekerenu uven-adam ki tifeqedenu
vatechaserehu me'at meelohim vekhavod vehadar te'aterehu vatameshilehu bema'asey yadeykha kol shata tachat-ragelayv
hine beshito khol tachetayv lo-hisheir davar shel-shat tachetayv ve'ata 'adayin eyn anu roim ki-khol hushat tachetayv
aval yeshu'a hamechusar me'at mimaleakhim oto rainu me'utar bekhavod vehadar mipeney 'unoto 'ad-mavet lema'an asher yite'am bechesed elohim et-hamavet be'ad kulam
ki-hu asher hakol lema'ano vehakol 'al-yado behanechoto vanim rabim lekhavod nae haya lo lehashelim be'inuyim et-sar yeshu'atam
ki gam-hameqadesh gam-hamequdashim kulam meechad hema ve'al-ken lo vosh miqero lahem achim
lemor asapera shimekha leechay betokh qahal ahalaleaa
veomer veqiveyti lo ve'od hine anokhi vehayeladim asher natan-li yeho
veya'an ki hayeladim kulam yachedav basar vadam af-hu lavash basar vadam kemohem lema'an asher yevatel 'al-yedey hamavet et asher-lo memeshelet hamavet hu hasatan
ulehatir kal-ele asher meeymat hamavet hayu netunim le'avedut kal-yemey chayeyhem
ki amenam lo bemaleakhim hecheziq ki im-bezera' averaham hecheziq
'al-ken tsarikh haya lo lehidamot leechayv bekhal-davar lema'an asher-yiheye kohen gadol rachaman veneeman be'ineyeney elohim lekhaper 'al-chatot ha'am
ki vaasher hu nusa vaye'une benafesho yakhol la'azor et-hamitenasim
lakhen achay haqedoshim chaverim baqeria shel-ma'ela habitu el-hashalicha vekhohen hodaatenu hagadol el-hamashicha yeshu'a
haneeman le'osehu kemshe bekhal-beyto
ki-tifeeret gedola mimshe nachal-hu kaasher bone habayit rav kevodo mikevod habayit
ki khal-bayit yesh-lo vone uvone hakol hu haelohim
vehen mshe neeman bekhal beyto ke'eved le'edut hadevarim ha'atidim
aval hamashicha hu keven 'al-beyto vaanachenu veyto uvilevad shenachaziq babitecha uvitehilat hatiqeva velo-narepena 'ad-haqets
lakhen kaasher yomar rucha haqodesh hayom im-beqolo tishema'u
al-taqeshu levavekhem kimeriva keyom masa bamidebar
asher nisuni avoteykhem bechanuni gam-rau fa'oli areba'im shana
lakhen aqut bador vaomar 'am to'ey levav hem vehem lo-yade'u derakhay
asher-nisheba'eti veapi im-yevoun el-menuchati
reu 'ata echay pen-yesh beechad mikem lev-ra' vachasar emuna lasur meelohim chayim
raq-hokhecha tokhichu ish et-re'ehu yom yom kal-'od sheyeamer hayom lema'an asher lo-yaqeshe ish mikem et-libo bemiremat hachete
ki chaverim hayinu lamashicha uvilevad shenachaziq babitecha harishona velo narepena 'ad-haqets
kemo sheneemar hayom im-beqolo tishema'u al-taqeshu levavekhem kimeriva
umi hem hashome'im vayarivu halo kal-yotseey mitserayim beyad-mshe
uvemi hiteqotet areba'im shana halo vachataim asher nafelu figereyhem bamidebar
ulemi nisheba' shel yavou el-menuchato ki im-lasorarim
vaanachenu roim shel yakhelu lavo 'al-asher lo heeminu
'al-ken behimatse 'od hahavetacha lavo el-menuchato nira na pen-yerae ish mikem meacher pe'amayv
ki gam-eleynu baa habesora kevoah aleyhem velahem lo-ho'il devar hashemu'a mipeney asher lo-hite'arav baemuna lashome'im
ki baey hamenucha anachenu hamaaminim kemo sheamar asher-nisheba'eti veapi im-yevoun el-menuchati af ki nigemeru ma'asey yeho me'et hivased ha'olam
ki 'al-hayom hashevi'i hakatuv omer vayishebot bayom hashevi'i mikal-melakheto
veomer 'od im-yevoun el-menuchati
veya'an ki-yesh-'od maqom lavo eleyha vaasher hitebaseru barishona hema lo-vau sham bemireyam
lakhen hosif liqebo'a yom miqets yamim rabim beamero 'al-yedey david hayom kemo sheneemar hayom im-beqolo tishema'u al-taqeshu levavekhem
ki ilu henicha lahem yehoshu'a lo-haya medaber acharey khen 'al-yom acher
'al-ken nisheara 'od menuchat shabat le'am elohim
ki haba el-menuchato gam-hu shavat mimelakheto kaasher haelohim mishelo
lakhen nisheqedah-na lavo el-hamenucha hahi lema'an asher lo-yikashel ish vehaya mamere kemohem
ki-devar haelohim chay hu ufo'el gevurot vechad mikal-cheerev pifiot veyored 'ad-lehavedil beyn-hanefesh uveyn harucha beyn hadevaqim uveyn-hamocha uvochen macheshevot levav umezimotayv
veeyn yetsur nisetar milefanayv ki-hakol chasuf vegaluy le'eyney-va'al devarim shelanu
ve'ata biheyot-lanu kohen gadol na'ale meod asher 'avar et-hashamayim yeshu'a ben-haelohim nachaziqa behodaat emunatenu
ki eyn lanu kohen gadol asher lo-yukhal lehitseta'er becholayeynu ki im-mitenase vakol kamonu uveli-chete
'al-ken niqereva bevitachon lifeney kise hechased laset rachamim velimetso chesed le'ezera be'itah
ki kal-kohen gadol halaqucha mitokh beney-adam mufeqad hu ba'avur beney adam be'ineyeney elohim lehaqeriv minecha vazevach 'al-hachataim
vehu yode'a lachemol 'al-hashogagim vehato'im biheyoto gam-hu yedu'a choli
asher-'al-ken chayav lehaqeriv 'al-hachataim be'ad-ha'am uve'ad-nafesho
veet-hagedula hazot lo-yiqach ish lenafesho raq haqaru lah meet haelohim keaharon
vekhen hamashicha lo-khibed et-nafesho liheyot kohen gadol ki im-mi sheamar elayv beni ata ani hayom yelidetikha
kemo sheamar gam-bemaqom acher atah-khohen le'olam 'al-diverati maleki-tsedeq
asher bimey heyoto vabasar hiqeriv tefilot vetachanunim bitse'aqa gedola uvidema'ot lifeney mi-sheyakhol lehoshi'o mimavet vaye'ater-lo mipeney yireato
veaf ki-haya haben lamad me'unoto lishemo'a
veacharey asher hushelam haya mametsi teshu'at 'olamim lekhal-shome'ayv
vehaelohim qara-lo kohen gadol 'al-diverati maleki-tsedeq
'al-zot yesh-lanu ledaber rabot veqashot levaer lakhem bemilin ya'an ki-khavedu azeneykhem
ki tachat asher lefi revot hayamim haya rauy lakhem liheyot melamedim 'ata tserikhim atem sheyashuvu vilamedu etekhem 'iqerey reshit diverey elohim vehitsetarakhetem lechalav velo lemaakhal bari
ki khol asher maakhalo chalav eynenu mevin bidevar-tsedeq ki-'odenu tinoq
velashelemim hamaakhal habari asher yesh lahem 'al-pi hanisayon chushim sheharegelu lehavechin beyn-tov lara'
'al-ken ba'azov ka'et reshit devar hamashicha na'avor el-hashelemut velo nashuv lashit yesodey hatesuva mima'asey mavet vehaemuna belohim
vetorat hatevilot usemikhat yadayim utechiyat hametim umishepat 'olam
veet-zot na'ase im-yiten hael
ki khol asher-nagah 'aleyhem haor veta'amu mimatenat hashamayim venitan lahem cheleqam berucha haqodesh
veta'amu et-devar-elohim hatov vekhochot ha'olam haba vehem nasogu achor
nimene'u mehitechadesh 'od liteshuva ki chazeru litselov lahem et-ben-haelohim vayitenuhu lemashal
ki haadama hashota et-hageshem hayored 'aleyha lemakhebir umotsia 'esev tov le'ovedeyha tisa verakha meet haelohim
vaasher totsi qots vedaredar nimeasa hi uqerova lameera vesofah lehisaref
amenam yediday muvetachim anachenu ki tovot meele bakhem uqerovot lishu'a af ki-dibarenu kazot
ki haelohim lo-ye'avet tsedeq lishekocha et-ma'aseykhem veet-'amal ahavatekhem asher hereeytem lema'an shemo shesheratem et-haqedosim ve'odekhem mesharatim
vechefetsenu shekal-echad mikem yisheqod liheyot nakhon libo batiqeva 'ad-haqets
shel te'atselu ki im-telekhu be'iqevot yoreshey hahavetachot beemuna veorekh nafesh
ki behaveticha elohim et-averaham nisheba' benafesho ya'an asher-eyn gadol mimenu lehishava' bo
vayomar ki-varekh avarekhekha vehareba arebe otakh
vayehi behaarikh nafesho vayinechal et-hahavetacha
beney haadam yishave'u bagadol mehem vehashevu'a lahem qets kal-machaloqet beqium hadavar
'al-ken kaasher ratsa haelohim lehareot beyoter et-yoreshey hahavetacha shel-tishetane 'atsato 'arav otah bishevu'a
lema'an bisheney devarim bileti mishetanim asher chalila lelohim mishaqer bam yiheye lanu asher nasenu elayv mivetach-'oz leechoz batiqeva hanetuna lefaneynu
asher-hi lenafeshenu ke'ogen nakhon vechazaq umagi'a el-mibeyt laparokhet
asher-ba shama ba'adenu yeshu'a ha'over lefaneynu vayehi-khohen gadol le'olam 'al-diverati maleki-tsedeq
ki ze maleki-tsedeq melekh shalem kohen leel 'eleyon asher yatsa liqerat averaham beshuvo mehakot et-hamelakhim vayevarakhehu
vaasher chalaq-lo averaham ma'aser mikol shemo hu melekh hatsedaqa ve'od melekh shalem hu melekh hashalom
beeyn-av beeyn-em beeyn yachas uleyamayv eyn techila ulechayayv eyn sof uvezot-nideme leven-haelohim hu 'omed bikhehunato lanetsach
ureu mah-gadol hu asher gam-averaham avinu natan-lo ma'aser mereshit hakol
hen-beney levi nochaley hakehuna yesh-choq lahem 'al-pi hatora laqachat et-hama'aserot min-ha'am min-acheyhem asher af-hem yotseey yerekh averaham
vaasher eynenu miteyaches lemishepachetam hu laqach et-hama'aser min-averaham vayevarekh et-asher hayetah-lo hahavetacha
vehine nakhon hadavar shehaqaton yevorakh 'al-yedey hagadol mimenu
ufo beney adam sheyamutu loqechim et-hama'aser aval sham loqecho mi shehu'ad 'alayv ki hu chay
veyitakhen lomar ki gam-levi halqecha et-hama'aserot haya me'aser ba'eser averaham
ki 'od beyerekh haav haya betset maleki-tsedeq liqerato
'al-ken ilu hayeta shelemut 'al-yedey khehunat beney levi asher-bah nitena hatora la'am lamah-ze tsarikh laqum 'od kohen acher 'al-diverati maleki-tsedeq velo yomar 'al-diverati aharon
ki behishetanot hakehuna tsarikh shetishetane gam-hatora
ki asher-medubar bo kazot hu mishevet acher asher me'olam lo-sheret ish mimenu bamizebecha
ki galuy lakol asher adoneynu tsamach mihuda min-hashevet asher mshe lo-diber elayv davar 'al-hakehuna
ve'od yoter barur hu im-yuqam bedimeyon maleki-tsedeq kohen acher
asher eynenu 'al-pi chuqat basar vadam ela 'al-pi kocha chayim sheeyn lahem hefeseq
ki-he'id 'alayv atah-khohen le'olam 'al-diverati maleki-tsedeq
ba'avur asher hamitseva haqodemet husara biheyotah chalusha veqitserat-yad meho'il
ki hatora hi lo-hishelima davar vehine nikhenesa tacheteyha tiqeva tova mimena asher-niqerav 'al-yadah lelohim
ukhefi asher lo belo shevu'a hayetah-zot
ki hema nitekahanu veli-shevu'a veze bishevu'a 'al-yedey haomer lo nisheba' yeho velo yinachem atah-khohen le'olam 'al-diverati maleki-tsedeq
hine bezot me'ula hi haberit asher yeshu'a 'arav otah
vesham nitekahanu rabim mipeney asher hamavet lo hinicham lehivater baarets
aval ze ya'amod le'olam vayehi-lo khehuna asher lo-ta'avor mimenu
asher 'al-ken yukhal lehoshi'a bakol vakhol et-hanigashim 'al-yado lelohim ki chay-hu tamid lehafegi' ba'adam
ki naavah-lanu kohen kaze shehu chasid vetamim vetahor venivedal min-hachataim venisa mehashamayim
asher eyn 'alayv kakohanim hagedolim hahem lehaqeriv yom yom barishona 'al-chatotayv veacharey-khen 'al-chatot ha'am ki-zot 'asa befa'am achat behaqerivo et-nafesho
ki hatora he'emida lekhohanim gedolim beney-adam chalashim aval devar-hashevu'a habaa acharey hatora he'emid et-haben hamushelam le'olam
veze rosh haneemarim sheyesh-lanu kohen gadol asher yashav limin kise hagedula bashamayim
vehu mesharet haqodesh vehamishekan haamiti asher-konano adonay velo adam
ki kal-kohen gadol hu mufeqad lehaqeriv menachot uzevachim ve'al-ken tsarikh shegam ze yiheye lo mah-sheyaqeriv
vehine ilu haya vaarets lo haya kohen ki yesh-po hakohanim hamaqerivim haqarebanot 'al-pi hatora
umekhahanim lidemut vetsel hadevarim shebashamayim kaasher tsuva mshe bevoo lehaqim et-hamishekan ki-amar elayv ree va'ase hakol betavenito asher-ata maree bahar
ve'ata hu qibel sherut me'ule kefi ma'alat haberit shehu saresor lah asher huqema 'al-havetachot tovot viterot
ki ilu hayeta harishona hahi gemura lo-yevuqash maqom lisheniya
ki-kho amar behokhicha otam hine yamim baim neum-yeho vekharati et-beyt yiserael veet-beyt yehuda berit chadasha
lo khaberit asher karati et-avotam beyom hecheziqi veyadam lehotsiam meerets mitserayim asher-hema heferu et-beriti veanokhi bachaleti vam neum-yeho
ki zot haberit asher ekherot et-beyt yiserael acharey hayamim hahem neum-yeho natati et-torati beqirebam ve'al-libam ekhetovena vehayiti lahem lelohim vehema yiheyu-li le'am
velo yelamedu 'od ish et-re'ehu veish et-achiv lemor de'u et-yeho ki khulam yede'u oti lemiqetanam ve'ad-gedolam
ki eselach la'aonam ulechatatam ulefishe'eyhem lo ezekar-'od
hine kesheamar berit chadasha yishen et-harishona umah-shehu noshan umazeqin qarav qitso
hen gam-haberit harishona gam lah hayu diney 'avoda umiqedash baarets
ki-huqam hamishekan hachitson asher-bo hamenora vehashulechan uma'arekhet halechem vehu niqera qodesh
umibeyt laparokhet hashenit mishekan haniqera qodesh haqodashim
asher-lo mizebach hazahav liqetoret vaaron haberit metsupe zahav kulo uvo tsinetsenet zahav asher haman betokho umate aharon asher parach veluchot haberit
umima'al lo keruvey hakavod hasokhakhim 'al-hakaporet lo nedaber ka'et 'al-kal-echad mehem levad
veacharey na'asu ele kakha bau hakohanim tamid el-hamishekan hachitson la'avod sham et-'avodatam
vehamishekan asher lifenim mimenu shama ba hakohen hagadol levado pa'am achat bashana lo biveli-dam asher yaqeriv be'ad nafesho uve'ad shigegot ha'am
verucha haqodesh modi'a bazot shel-nigela haderekh el-haqodesh kal hayamim asher ya'amod hamishekan hachitson
vehu mashal lazeman haze asher bo maqerivim menachot uzevachim asher eyn bahem lehashelim et-levav ha'oved
ki im-chuqot habasar hena 'im-hamaakhalot vehamasheqim vehatevilot hashonot asher nitenu 'ad-'et hatiqun
vehamashicha bevoo liheyot kohen gadol latovot ha'atidot 'avar betokh hamishekan hame'ule bigedula ushelemut asher lo-na'asa bidey adam ki-eynenu mehaberia hazot
gam lo-va bedam se'irim va'agalim ki vedam-nafesho ba befa'am-achat el-haqodesh penima vayimetsa geulat 'olam
ki im-dam haparim vehase'irim veefer hapara asher yuze 'al-hatemeim yeqadeshem letaher besaram
af ki-dam hamashicha asher-hiqeriv et-'atsemo lelohim berucha nitsechi uveli-mum yetaher libekhem mimaa'asey mavet la'avod et-elohim chayim
uva'avur zot hu metaavekh liverit chadasha lema'an asher-yireshu hameqoraim et-havetachat nachalat 'olam acharey asher-met lifedot min-hapesha'im asher na'asu bimey haberit harishona
ki vimeqom sheyesh berit hi tsavaa tsarikh shetivada' mitat hanoten
ki raq-bemot hamet tikon hatsavaa veeyn lah toqef bechayey hanoten
lakhen gam-harishona lo chunekha belo-dam
ki kekhalot mshe lesaper lekhal-ha'am et-kal-mishepetey hatora laqach dam ha'agalim vehase'irim 'im-mayim vetola'at shani veezov vayizeroq 'al-hasefer ve'al kal-ha'am
vayomar hine dam-haberit asher tsiva elohim aleykhem
vegam 'al-hamishekan ve'al kal-keley hasharet hiza dam
vekhime'at hakol yetuhar badam 'al-pi hatora veeyn kapara belo-shefikhat dam
lakhen dimeyoney hadevarim shebashamayim tserikhim sheyitaharu vaele vehadevarim shebashamayim be'atsemam tserikhim sheyitaharu bizevachim tovim meele
ki hamashicha lo-va el-haqodesh hana'ase bidey adam shehu raq-demut haamiti ki im-ba el-'etsem hashamayim leraot 'ata va'adenu et-peney haelohim
af-lo lehaqeriv et-nafesho pe'amim rabot kakohen hagadol asher-ba shana beshana el-haqodesh bedam acherim
ki im-ken halo hayah-lo le'anot pe'amim rabot mereshit ha'olam ve'ata beqets ha'itim nigela befa'am achat kedey-lekhale et-hachete bezevach nafesho
vekhaasher nigezar 'al-beney adam lamut pa'am echat veacharey-khen hamishepat
ken-huqerav hamashicha pa'am achat laset chete rabim ufa'am shenit yerae veli-chete lishu'a lamechakim lo
ki hatora biheyot ba tsel hatovot ha'atidot velo maree 'etsem hadevarim eyn bikhaletah le'olam lehashelim et-haqerevim baqarebanot hahem asher yaqerivu tamid midey shana veshana
ki im-ken halo chadelu lahaviam ki lo-hayeta 'od yedi'at chataim bemaqerivim behitaharam pa'am echat
aval yesh-sham hazekarat hachataim shana veshana
ki dam-haparim vehase'irim lo yukhal lehasir chataim
ve'al-ken omer bevoo la'olam zevach uminecha lo chafatseta geviya konaneta li
'ola vechataa lo shaaleta
az amareti hineh-vati bimegilat-sefer katuv 'alay la'asot retsonekha elohay
acharey amero lema'ela zevach uminecha 'ola vechataa lo chafatseta velo shaaleta asher yaqerivu otam 'al-pi hatora
az amar hineh-vati la'asot retsonekha elohay ma'avir baze et-harishon lema'an haqim et-hasheni
uvaratson haze mequdashim anachenu 'al-yedey haqeravat qareban gufo shel-yeshu'a hamashicha befa'am echat
vekhal-kohen 'omed yom yom lesharet umosif pe'amim rabot lehaqeriv haqarebanot hahema asher lo-yukhelu le'olam leha'avir chataim
vehu acharey haqerivo zevach echad 'al-hachataim yashav limin haelohim lanetsach
umeaz yechake 'ad ki-yushetu oyevayv hadom leragelayv
ki hu beqareban echad hishelim lanetsach et-hamequdashim
veaf-rucha haqodesh me'id lanu 'al-zot ki acharey amero
zot haberit asher ekherot itam acharey hayamim hahem amar yeho natati et-torati beqirebam ve'al-libam ekhetovena
vela'aonam ulechatatam lo ezekar-'od
vehine bimeqom sheyesh selichat hachataim eyn 'od qareban 'aleyhem
ve'ata echay biheyot lanu bitechon derekh haqodesh bedam yeshu'a
derekh chadash vachay asher chidesh lanu baparokhet hi vesaro
uviheyot lanu kohen gadol 'al-beyt elohim
niqerevah-na belevav shalem uveemuna temima metoharim behazayat levavenu merucha ra'a urechutsey habasar bemayim tehorim
nachaziqa behodaat hatiqeva bal-nimot ki-neeman hamaveticha
venitebonana ish 'al-achiv le'orer otanu leahava ulema'asim tovim
veal-na'azov et-kenesiyatenu kederekh qetsat anashim ki im-nazehir ish et-re'ehu uveyoter bireotekhem ki-qarav hayom
ki im-necheta vezadon acharey asher hayeta lanu yedi'at haemet lo-yishaer 'od zevach 'al-hachataim
ki im-bi'utey hadin he'atid veesh qinea asher tokhal et-hatsorarim
hen ish ki-yafer torat mshe mot yamut beli chemela 'al-pi shenayim 'edim o-shelosa
umah-da'etekhem kama yigedal ha'onesh hanakhon lemi sheromes beragelo et-ben-haelohim ve'ose et-dam haberit asher-hu mequdash bo kechol umecharef et-rucha hechased
ki-yada'enu mi hu haomer li naqam veshilem ve'od ki-yadin yeho 'amo
mah-nora linepol beyad elohim chayim
aval zikheru-na et-hayamim harishonim ki az acharey oru 'eyneykhem nesatem tseva 'inuyim rabim
pa'am biheyotekhem leraava becherepa vetuga pa'am behishetatef 'im habaim batsarot kemokhem
ki hitseta'aretem 'al-haasirim ugezelat rekhushekhem sevaletem besimecha mida'etekhem benafeshekhem sheyesh-lakhem bashamayim qineyan tov mimenu veqayam la'ad
lakhen al-tashelikhu et-bitechonekhem ki yesh-lo sakhar rav
ki tserikhim atem lesavelanut lema'an ta'asu retson elohim unesatem et-hahavetacha
ki 'od me'at-raga' vehaba yavo lo yeacher
hatsadiq beemunato yicheye veim-yisog achor lo-ratseta nafeshi bo
aval eyn anachenu min-hanesogim achor laavod ki im-min-hamaaminim lehatsil nafeshenu
ki haemuna hi vitachon bemah-shenetsape lo vehokhachat devarim sheeynam nireim
vehi shehu'ada 'al haavot
baemuna navin ki-ha'olamot na'asu bidevar haelohim lehotsi haniree min-hane'elam
baemuna hiqeriv hevel lelohim zevach tov miqayin asher hayah-lo le'edut ki tsadiq hu beha'id elohim 'al-minechotayv uvah 'odenu medaber acharey moto
baemuna luqach chanokh levileti reoto hamavet veeynenu ki-laqach oto elohim vehu'ad 'alayv lifeney hilaqecho ki et-haelohim hitehalakh
uveli emuna ish lo-yiheye ratsuy lelohim ki khal-haqarev elayv tsarikh sheyaamin ki-yesh elohim ugemul hu meshiv ledoreshayv
baemuna nizehar nocha vaya'as et-hateva lehatsil et-beyto acharey asher-tsuva 'al devarim shel nireim vayaresha' bah et-ha'olam vayehi leyoresh hatsedaqa 'eqev haemuna
baemuna shama' averaham kaasher niqera lalekhet el-haarets asher yirashena vayetse velo-yada' ana yavo
baemuna haya ger beerets hahavetacha kemo venakheriya vayeshev beohalim hu veyitsechaq veya'aqov asher-yareshu 'imo hahavetacha hahi
ki-chika la'ir asher yesudatah neemana uvonah umekhonanah haelohim
baemuna sara gam-hi matsea kocha lehazeri'a vateled acharey velotah ki-chasheva et-hamaveticha leneeman
'al-ken meechad asher kime'at met besaro yatseu kekhokhevey hashamayim larov vekhachol 'al-sefat hayam asher lo yisafer
baemuna metu khal-ele velo rau et-hahavetachot raq merachoq tsipu lahen vayivetechu vayisemechu liqeratan vayodu ki-gerim hem vetoshavim baarets
ki hamedaberim kazot modi'im ki-matarat chefetsam erets moshav
veilu hayeta da'etam 'al-haarets hahi asher yatseu mimena hine haya veyadam lashuv eleyha
akhen nikhesefu lemoshav tov mimenu vehu bashamayim ve'al-ken lo vosh haelohim mehem lehiqare eloheyhem ki-hekhin lahem 'ir
baemuna haya ma'ale averaham et-yitsechaq kaasher nusa veet-yechido yaqeriv hameqabel et-hahavetachot
asher neemar-lo ki veyitsechaq yiqare lekha zara'
vayachashov belibo ki yakhol elohim lehachayot gam et-hametim 'al-ken gam-hushav elayv liheyot lemashal
baemuna berakh yitsechaq et-ya'aqov veet-'esav vayedaber 'al-'atidot lamo
baemuna berakh ya'aqov et-sheney veney-yosef lifeney moto vayishetachu 'al-rosh hamate
baemuna hizekir yosef biqerav-qitso et-yetsiat beney yiserael vayetsav 'al-'atsemotayv
baemuna hitsepinu et-mshe avotayv shelosa yerachim achar hivaledo kireotam et-hayeled ki-tov hu velo yareu mipeney mitsevat hamelekh
baemuna meen mshe kaasher gadel lehiqare ven levat-pare'o
vayivechar lisebol et-'oni 'am-elohim milehite'aneg lesha'a beta'anugey hachete
bechashevo et-cherepat hamashicha le'oser gadol meotserot mitserayim ki hibit el-hagemul
baemuna yatsa meerets mitserayim velo yare mechamat hamelekh ki haya keroe et asher-eynenu niree vayitechazaq
baemuna 'asa et-hapesach unetinat hadam lema'an asher lo-yiga' hamashechit bivekhoreyhem
baemuna 'averu et-yam-suf bayabasha asher nisu mitserayim gam-hema la'avar-bo vayiteba'u
baemuna nafelu chomot yericho acharey hiqifu otan shive'at yamim
baemuna lo aveda rachav hazona 'im-hasorarim ki-asefa et-hameragelim el-beytah beshalom
uma omar 'od hen tiqetsar ha'et misaper ma'asey gide'on uvaraq veshimeshon veyifetach vedavid ushemuel vehaneviim
asher baemuna kibeshu mamelakhot ufa'alu tsedeq vehisigu havetachot vesakheru fi arayot
vekhibu gevurat haesh venimeletu mipi hacherev vehitechazequ mechuleshatam ve'asu chayil bamilechama vehipilu machanot zarim
nashim laqechu mitechiya et-meteyhen vaacherim ruteshu ve'inuyim velo ratsu lehinatsel lema'an yizeku litechiya tova mimena
mehem nusu niseyon ta'alulim umakot vegam-nimeseru lekhevel umaseger
niseqelu vaavanim nuseru vamegera nivechanu veyisurim metu lefi-charev vayanu'u 'atufey 'orot kevasim ve'izim bechoser uve'otser ra'a veyagon
asher ha'olam lo-haya kheday lahem hem ta'u bamidebar uveharim uvame'arot uvineqiqey haarets
vekhal-ele af ki-hu'ad 'aleyhem bigelal emunatam lo laqechu et-hahavetacha
lema'an asher lo-yushelemu bile'adeynu ki tsafa lanu elohim miqedem tova yetera
lakhen gam-anachenu asher-'anan 'edim rav kaze mesovev otanu nashelikha mimenu kal-torach vehachete hamaqif 'aleynu venarutsa vesavelanut et-hamerutsa ha'arukha lefaneynu
venabita el-yeshu'a rosh haemuna umashelimah asher be'ad hasimecha hashemura lo qibel et-hatseluv vayivez hacherepa vayeshev limin kise haelohim
hitebonanu elayv asher-nasa khelima gedola khazot meet hachataim lema'an asher lo ti'afu velo tige'u benafeshoteykhem
'adayin lo 'amadetem bemilechametekhem 'im-hachete 'ad-ladam
vatishekechu nichumey hamedaber aleykhem kedaber el-banim lemor musar yeho beni al-timeas veal-taqots betokhacheto
ki et asher yeehav yeho yokhicha yakheiv et-ben yiretse
im-meqabelim atem musar de'u ki-kheav 'im-banayv mitenaheg elohim 'imakhem ki mi haben asher aviv lo yeyaserenu
veim-tiheyu veeyn-musar asher haya menat kulam az mamezerim atem velo vanim
ve'od im-avot besarenu hayu meyaserim otanu vanira mehem af ki-nikana' lifeney avi haruchot venicheye
ki hema yiserunu katov be'eyneyhem lesha'a qala aval ze leho'il lema'an yiheyeh-lanu cheleq biqedushato
vekhal-musar kesheba 'aleynu eynenu simecha ve'eyneynu ki im-yagon aval beacharito yiten peri shalom litsedaqa limelumadayv
'al-ken chazequ yadayim rafot uvirekayim koselot
uma'egal rageleykhem palesu lema'an lo-tite hatsole'a min-haderekh ki im-terafe
ridefu et-hashalom 'im-kal-adam veet haqedusha asher bile'adeyha lo-yiree ish et-haadon
vehizaharu pen-yesh bakhem ish asher yechedal mechesed elohim pen-ya'iq lakhem shoresh pore la'ana veyitameu vo rabim
pen-yimatse vakhem zone o chalal ke'esav asher benazid echad makhar et-bekhorato
halo yeda'etem ki nimeas acharey khen kaasher ratsa lareshet et-haberakha ki lo-matsa maqom liteshuva af ki-viqesh otah bidema'ot
ki lo-vatem el-har nimeshash uvo'er baesh velo el-'anan va'arafel use'ara
velo leqol shofar uleqol hadevarim asher shome'ayv biqeshu shel yosif ledaber 'imahem 'od
ki lo-yakhelu laset et asher tsuuu gam-im-behema tiga' bahar saqol tisaqel o-yaro tiyare bachitsim
vehamaree haya nora 'ad-meod vayomer mshe yagoreti vecharadeti
ki im-batem el-har tsion veel-'ir elohim chayim el-yerushalayim shebashamayim
veel-maqehelat rivavot hamaleakhim va'adat habekhorim haketuvim bashamayim veel-elohim shofet hakol veel-ruchot hatsadiqim hanishelamim
veel-yeshu'a metavekh haberit hachadasha veel-dam hahazaa hameytiv daber midam-havel
lakhen reu pen-temaanu lishemo'a el-hamedaber ki hen lo nimeletu hameanim lishemo'a el-hamedaber 'imahem baarets af ki-anachenu im-nemaen lishemo'a beqol hamedaber min-hashamayim
asher qolo hire'ish az et-haarets ve'ata ze hiveticha lemor 'od achat vaani mare'ish lo et-haarets bilevad ela af et-hashamayim
vezu 'od achat sheamar mashemi'a shinuy hadevarim hamite'are'arim asher hem 'asuyim lema'an ya'amod asher eynenu nire'ash
lakhen anachenu hameqabelim malekhut asher lo timot navoah-na vetoda vena'avod bah et-haelohim kiretsono bitseni'ut uveyirea
ki eloheynu esh okhela hu
ahavat haachim ta'amod
hakhenasat orechim al-tishekachu ki-yesh asher asefu maleakhim el-beytam velo yada'u
zikheru et-haasurim keilu atem asurim 'imahem veet hanilechatsim baasher gam-atem babasar
haishut tiqar bakol vitsu'akhem al-yechulal et-hazonim veet-hamenaafim yadin elohim
rachaqu meahavat kesef viheyu semechim becheleqekhem ki hu amar lo arepekha velo e'ezeveaa
'al-ken nivetach venomar yeho li be'ozeray lo ira mah-ya'ase li adam
zikheru et-manehigeykhem asher-higidu lakhem et-devar haelohim binu leacharit darekam ulekhu beemunatam
yeshu'a hamashicha kemo shehu etemol ken hayom vegam-le'olamim
al-tino'u betorot shonot vezarot ki tov lekhonen libenu bachesed velo bidevarim shel-maakhal asher lo ho'ilu lanohagim bahem
yesh-lanu mizebecha asher eyn lahem reshut limesharatey hamishekan leekhol me'alayv
ki-habehemot asher huva daman baqodesh lekhaparat hachete 'al-yedey hakohen hagadol geviyoteyhen niserefu michuts lamachane
ba'avur zot gam-yeshu'a 'una michuts lasha'ar lema'an qadesh et-ha'am bedamo
lakhen netseah-na elayv el-michuts lamachane venisa et-cherepato
ki-fo eyn-lanu 'ir 'omadet ki im-et-ha'ir ha'atida anachenu mevaqeshim
lakhen naqeriv 'al-yado bekhal-'et zevach toda lelohim hi-feri sefatayim hamodot lishemo
veal-tishekechu ligemol chesed velatet laeveyonim ki-zevachim kaele ye'erevu lelohim
shime'u el-manehigeykhem vehikane'u mipeneyhem ki-shoqedim hem 'al-nafeshoteykhem ka'atidim latet cheshebon lema'an ya'asu-zot besimecha velo vaanacha ki lo-leho'il zot lakhem
hitepalalu ba'adenu ki yada'enu asher shelema machashavetenu venachepots lalekhet derekh yeshara bakol
veefetsar bakhem meod la'asot hadavar haze lema'an ushav aleykhem bimehera
velohey hashalom asher bedam berit 'olam he'ela min-hametim et-ro'e hatson hagadol et-yeshu'a adoneynu
hu yashelimekhem bekhal-ma'ase tov la'asot retsono befa'olo vakhem et-haratsuy lefanayv beyad-yeshu'a hamashicha lo hakavod le'olemey 'olamim amen
vaavaqesh mikem achay seu-na devar hatokhecha ki khataveti aleykhem biqetsera
ude'u ki timotios achinu shulach chafeshi veim-yavo vimehera eree ito et-peneykhem
shaalu lishelom kal-manehigeykhem velishelom kal-haqedosim beney erets italeya shoalim lishelomekhem
hachesed 'im-kulekhem amen ﻿
